name: The Infinite Dream: Diana Serenella
description:
"Mm... do you... need something from me?"

Dreamweavers are masters of Dream Magic, weaving sweet dreams and peaceful slumber.

Yet, their craft goes beyond the ethereal.

With enough skill, they can shape dreams into reality itself.

And at the height of this extraordinary art stands none other than Diana Serenella, "The Dreamer."

The dreams she brings into reality are unmatched, just like the power she wields.

So, will you be able to withstand the dreams she weaves?

Welcome to the dream...

"Domain Expansion: Lucid Dream."
creator: Dracob
